subcodes.first_line: O esteemed family! Praise be to God that this household stands firm in their faith in the one true God and remains steadfast in the path of the Almighty [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عائله محترمه الحمد لله آنخانه واده مومن بخداوند یگانه اند و در سبیل الهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution
